name: Silobreaker
description: Integrate with Silobreaker intelligence platform to search documents, entities, network indicators, and threat intelligence across open and dark web sources

auth_config.note: HMAC digest; apikey and digest as query params

actions.name: Search Documents
actions.description: Search Silobreaker indexed documents from news, blogs, dark web, and social media for threat intelligence

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query using Silobreaker query syntax

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Document type filter (news, blog, forum, paste, social, darkweb)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Search Entities
actions.description: Search Silobreaker for extracted entities including threat actors, malware, IPs, domains, and CVEs

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Entity type filter (ThreatActor, Malware, IPv4, Domain, CVE, Country, Organization)

actions.name: Get Entity Relations
actions.description: Get entities related to a specified entity for threat intelligence pivoting and correlation

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Silobreaker entity ID to find relations for

actions.name: Search Network Indicators
actions.description: Search Silobreaker for network indicators (IPs, domains, URLs) correlated with threat intelligence

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Network indicator value to search (IP, domain, URL)

actions.name: Search Threat Actors
actions.description: Search Silobreaker for threat actor intelligence from open source and dark web monitoring

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Threat actor name or alias to search

actions.name: Search Malware
actions.description: Search Silobreaker for malware intelligence including families, variants, and IOC associations

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Malware name or keyword to search

actions.name: Get STIX/TAXII Feed
actions.description: Retrieve Silobreaker threat indicators via STIX TAXII feed format for automated ingestion

parameters.name: added_after
parameters.description: Filter for objects added after this timestamp (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of STIX objects to return
